title: thevenotia scabra
intro: Thevenotia scabra, also known as the rough-leaved Thunbergia, is a plant species in the genus Thunbergia. It is a tropical climber native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Acanthaceae. Thevenotia scabra has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, and is used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional medicine to provide relief from pain and to promote overall health and well-being.
